description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using python:3.6-slim as the default image, defining stages lint, test, build-package, and build-docker, and set the default variables as needed. In the lint stage add a flake8 job that excludes tag pipelines and runs `pip install -r requirements/dev.txt` then `flake8`. In the test stage add pytest-cp36 (python:3.6-slim) and pytest-cp37 (python:3.7-slim) jobs that both exclude tags and execute `pip install -r requirements/dev.txt` and `pytest`, and also add a migration-test job that allows failure, excludes tags, sets `DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=migration_testing`, runs `pip install yagura django-bulma`, copies `yagura/tests/migration_testing.py`, runs `./manage.py migrate`, uninstalls yagura, installs it editable, and runs `./manage.py migrate` again. In the build-package stage add a build-testpypi-packages job that runs only on master and release/* branches, checks that the project namespace is attakei, runs `bin/gen-pypirc`, `bin/gen-devver`, installs packaging requirements, updates apt and installs gettext, compiles Django messages, builds source and wheel with `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel`, and uploads to TestPyPI with `twine upload -r testpypi dist/*` while setting `DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=yagura.settings.base`, and a package-to-pypi job that runs only on tags and performs the same steps but uploads to the main PyPI repository with `twine upload dist/*`. In the build-docker stage add a build-public-docker-image job that runs only on tags, uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, checks the namespace, defines `IMAGE_TAG` from `CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME` replacing '/' with '-', builds `attakei/yagura:$IMAGE_TAG` and `attakei/yagura:$IMAGE_TAG-mysqlclient` (with `--build-arg USE_MYSQLCLIENT=1`), logs into Docker Hub using `$DOCKER_HUB_TOKEN`, and pushes the images.
